channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Treasury Department Launches Audit on Payment System Security Amid DOGE Controversy
item.description: The Treasury Department's Office of Inspector General is launching an audit on the security controls for the federal government's payment system following concerns raised by Democratic senators about access provided to Trump aide Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency team.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The Pitfalls of Cloud Migration: A Cautionary Tale
item.description: Cloud migration success requires more than just lifting and shifting existing infrastructure. Discover the common pitfalls to avoid and the steps to take for a healthy cloud transformation.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
